chunks.text: Let us quickly understand merging.

chunks.text: See if I have a list A and B with some set of elements if I have two sorted list then

chunks.text: How much time it has taken for merging?

chunks.text: I have to merge these four lists I can merge them together also but that will be called

chunks.title: Optimal Merge Pattern - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So let us see how merging can be done.

chunks.title: Optimal Merge Pattern - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So what is the answer.

chunks.text: Total cost is how much 11 plus 5 plus 16 total cost is 32.

chunks.text: So now from this observation we can say that the greedy method that we should follow is

chunks.text: So we will take one problem and solve that one.

chunks.title: Optimal Merge Pattern - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Here is an example problem for optimal merge pattern.

chunks.title: Optimal Merge Pattern - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: I have a five files x1 x2 x3 to x5 are files file names and these are the sizes the number

chunks.title: Optimal Merge Pattern - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: of elements in each file.

chunks.title: Optimal Merge Pattern - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now we will follow greedy approach for solving this one.

chunks.title: Optimal Merge Pattern - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: We have to find out a pattern in which the total cost of merging is minimized.

chunks.title: Optimal Merge Pattern - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So let us follow greedy method.

chunks.title: Optimal Merge Pattern - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Greedy method says that you should always select a smaller pair of files for merging.

chunks.title: Optimal Merge Pattern - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So they are not arranged in the increasing order of their sizes.

chunks.title: Optimal Merge Pattern - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: I will take them in increasing order of their sizes.

chunks.text: Now let us follow optimal merge pattern.

chunks.title: Optimal Merge Pattern - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So we should select a smaller pair of files and merge them 5 and 10.

chunks.text: So I will merge these two.

chunks.text: I will get a new file of size 15.

chunks.title: Optimal Merge Pattern - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari

chunks.title: Optimal Merge Pattern - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So the total cost of merging these files by following a optimal pattern is 205.

chunks.title: Optimal Merge Pattern - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari

chunks.title: Optimal Merge Pattern - Greedy Method - Abdul Bari

chunks.text: Even this total will also be 205.
